en: And Elihu continued, and said:
zh: 以利戶又接著說：

en: "Bear with me a little, and I will show you, for I have yet something to say on God's behalf.
zh: “你再等我片刻我就指示你， 因為我還有話要為 神說。

en: I will get my knowledge from afar and ascribe righteousness to my Maker.
zh: 我要從遠處引來我的意見， 把公義歸給我的創造主。

en: For truly my words are not false; one who is perfect in knowledge is with you.
zh: 我的話真的不是謊言， 有一位知識全備的與你同在。

en: "Behold, God is mighty, and does not despise any; he is mighty in strength of understanding.
zh: 神大有能力，並且不藐視人， 他的智慧大有能力。

en: He does not keep the wicked alive, but gives the afflicted their right.
zh: 他不容惡人生存， 卻為困苦人主持公道。

en: He does not withdraw his eyes from the righteous, but with kings on the throne he sets them forever, and they are exalted.
zh: 他的眼目時常看顧義人， 他使他們與君王同坐寶座， 他們永遠被高舉。

en: And if they are bound in chains and caught in the cords of affliction,
zh: 他們若被鎖鍊捆住， 被苦難的繩索纏住，

en: then he declares to them their work and their transgressions, that they are behaving arrogantly.
zh: 他就把他們的作為和過犯都顯示， 使他們知道他們驕傲自大。

en: He opens their ears to instruction and commands that they return from iniquity.
zh: 他開啟他們的耳朵可以領受教訓， 吩咐他們離開罪孽而悔改。

en: If they listen and serve him, they complete their days in prosperity, and their years in pleasantness.
zh: 他們若聽從他、事奉他， 就必幸福地度盡他們的日子， 也必快樂地度過他們的歲月。

en: But if they do not listen, they perish by the sword and die without knowledge.
zh: 他們若不聽從，就必死在刀下， 毫無知識地氣絕身亡。

en: "The godless in heart cherish anger; they do not cry for help when he binds them.
zh: 那些心裡不敬虔的人積存怒氣， 神捆綁他們，他們竟不呼求。

en: They die in youth, and their life ends among the cult prostitutes.
zh: 他必早年喪命， 喪命如廟妓一樣。

en: He delivers the afflicted by their affliction and opens their ear by adversity.
zh: 神藉著苦難救拔困苦人， 以他們所受的壓迫開啟他們的耳朵。

en: He also allured you out of distress into a broad place where there was no cramping, and what was set on your table was full of fatness.
zh: 他也誘導你脫離患難的虎口， 到寬闊不狹窄之地， 到你擺滿肥甘的席上。

en: "But you are full of the judgment on the wicked; judgment and justice seize you.
zh: 你卻滿有惡人所當受的審判， 審斷和刑罰把你抓住。

en: Beware lest wrath entice you into scoffing, and let not the greatness of the ransom turn you aside.
zh: 你要小心不可讓忿怒激動你，以致侮慢 神， 也不要因贖價大而偏離正道。

en: Will your cry for help avail to keep you from distress, or all the force of your strength?
zh: 你的呼求、或一切勢力， 能使你不受患難嗎？

en: Do not long for the night, when peoples vanish in their place.
zh: 你不可切慕黑夜來臨， 就是眾人在他們的住處被除滅的時候。

en: Take care; do not turn to iniquity, for this you have chosen rather than affliction.
zh: 你要小心，不可轉向罪孽， 因為你選擇罪孽而不選擇患難。

en: Behold, God is exalted in his power; who is a teacher like him?
zh: 神靠自己的能力高高在上， 有誰像 神指教人呢？

en: Who has prescribed for him his way, or who can say, 'You have done wrong'?
zh: 誰把他所行的道路派給他？ 誰能說：‘你所行的不義’呢？

en: "Remember to extol his work, of which men have sung.
zh: 你要記得稱讚他所行的為大， 就是眾人所歌頌的。

en: All mankind has looked on it; man beholds it from afar.
zh: 他所行的，萬人都看見， 世人都從遠處觀看。

en: Behold, God is great, and we know him not; the number of his years is unsearchable.
zh: 神為至大，我們不能了解， 他的年數，無法測度。

en: For he draws up the drops of water; they distill his mist in rain,
zh: 他吸收滴滴水點， 使水滴在雲霧中化成雨，

en: which the skies pour down and drop on mankind abundantly.
zh: 雲層傾下雨水， 沛然降在世人身上。

en: Can anyone understand the spreading of the clouds, the thunderings of his pavilion?
zh: 誰能明白雲彩的展開， 和 神行宮的雷聲呢？

en: Behold, he scatters his lightning about him and covers the roots of the sea.
zh: 他在自己的周圍展開電光， 又用水遮蓋海底；

en: For by these he judges peoples; he gives food in abundance.
zh: 他用這些審斷萬人， 又賜予豐盛的糧食；

en: He covers his hands with the lightning and commands it to strike the mark.
zh: 他以電光遮蓋雙手， 然後吩咐電光去攻擊目標，

en: Its crashing declares his presence; the cattle also declare that he rises.
zh: 他以雷聲宣揚自己， 甚至牲畜也注意將有甚麼臨近。”
